verdict.answer_first: A and B both lead with the bottom line; A: "It's a data-leak bug waiting to happen", B: "Short version: this is a cross-request data leak waiting to happen".
verdict.decisiveness: A is tighter: it gives one prescription first, "thread the value explicitly", while B adds a fuller AsyncLocalStorage implementation and rule-of-thumb, which slightly dilutes the single recommendation.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to save and apply: "function handler(req, res) { res.send(render(req.user)); }" plus the trap principle; B is useful but longer.
